arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany recalls facing Brendan Rodgers as player and tells how that may impact Bayern Munich vs Celtic
arts.sum: Kompany was a player when his Manchester City side faced Leicester and Liverpool during Rodgers ‘ time down south and the Belgian knows how dramatically different life is as a player and then as a coach. “I think the depth of analysis you go into as a coach is slightly different than as a player,” Kompany said.
